query: SELECT id, filename, latitude, longitude, altitude, mediaType, capturedAt, createdAt, thumbnailUrl, notes FROM media WHERE projectId = 540001 AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 20 OFFSET 60;
